tasks.subject: Task 0: Database Schema Rename (Drizzle definitions)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rename all Drizzle schema definitions from agentTask* to routine*, move directory from task/ to routine/.

**Files:**
- Rename dir: apps/server/libs/database/src/schemas/task/ â†’ schemas/routine/
- Rename all schema files (tasks.ts â†’ routines.ts, etc.)
- Modify: relations.ts, index.ts, schemas/index.ts

**Verify:** `pnpm build:server` â†’ compiles without errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/server/libs/database/src/schemas/task/"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build:server", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All Drizzle table/enum/type variables renamed", "Table name strings updated", "taskIdâ†’routineId fields updated", "taskcastTaskId unchanged", "Re-exports updated"]}
```

tasks.description:

**Verify:** `pnpm db:generate && pnpm db:migrate` â†’ succeeds
